meaning: What fraction of captured images are usable? Corrupted images remove coverage — below 30 triggers the critical drone gate.
source_chain_text: image_validity_ratio <- valid_images / total_images <- Images source file
gate_action: Sets image_capture_score = 0 (no recoverable survey data). Raises FLAG: CRITICAL_IMAGE_FAILURE.

meaning: What fraction of valid images have GPS coordinates? Images without geotags cannot be used in photogrammetric reconstruction.
source_chain_text: image_geotag_ratio <- geotagged_images / total_images <- Images source file

meaning: Do the actual image positions prove sufficient overlap exists? Computed from real EXIF positions, independent of any GCS log.
source_chain_text: min(image_computed_overlap_fwd_pct, image_computed_overlap_lat_pct) <- EXIF GPS + camera footprint geometry

meaning: Are images in a format that preserves full radiometric data? DNG and RAW formats preserve full sensor depth.
source_chain_text: image_format_is_raw <- image_format field <- Images source file

meaning: How stable was camera exposure throughout the entire flight session? High exposure variance means radiometric inconsistency.
source_chain_text: exposure_consistency_ratio <- std_dev(EXIF.ExposureTime) / mean(EXIF.ExposureTime) <- Images source file

meaning: Do the camera make and model in EXIF match the calibration file? Wrong calibration applied to wrong hardware ruins geometric accuracy.
source_chain_text: camera_make_match + camera_model_match <- EXIF.Make/Model vs calibration file
gate_action: Also used by CAL_CONF (different thresholds — see L3I_CAL_002).

meaning: Where did the calibration parameters come from? Physically measured > database lookup > self-calibrated.
source_chain_text: calibration_source <- Camera Calibration source file
gate_action: Also used by CAL_CONF (different thresholds — see L3I_CAL_001).

meaning: Did the rover record throughout the entire flight with adequate buffer before and after?
source_chain_text: rinex_coverage_ratio + pre_buffer_sec + post_buffer_sec <- obs_duration_sec / flight_duration_sec

meaning: How strong and clean was the satellite signal during the flight? C/N0 below 30dBHz indicates degraded signal.
source_chain_text: cn0_mean_dbhz + cycle_slip_count <- Rover RINEX source file

meaning: Is dual-frequency GNSS data available? Enables ionospheric correction critical for PPK precision.
source_chain_text: dual_freq_available <- dual_freq_ratio > 0.95 <- Rover RINEX source file

meaning: Were there any critical recording gaps? A gap over 60 seconds during a short drone flight effectively breaks PPK.
source_chain_text: critical_gap_present <- any_gap_gt_60s <- Rover RINEX source file
gate_action: HARD RULE: Sets rover_continuity_score = 0. Raises FLAG: RINEX_CRITICAL_GAP.

meaning: How quickly did the rover reach stable satellite tracking after recording began?
source_chain_text: rover_acquisition_time_sec <- time from first RINEX epoch to first stable tracking

meaning: How good was satellite geometry during the actual flight window? PDOP magnifies all measurement errors.
source_chain_text: mean_pdop_during_flight + max_pdop_during_flight <- computed from satellite positions within BIN-derived flight window

meaning: What fraction of the planned survey area was actually flown? An unflown area is unflown data.
source_chain_text: area_coverage_ratio <- actual_coverage_pct / 100 <- L2D_FC_004 derived from image footprints + BIN waypoints

meaning: How closely did the achieved GSD match what was planned? GSD determines the resolution of the deliverable.
source_chain_text: gsd_execution_ratio <- actual_gsd_cm / planned_gsd_cm <- BIN altitude + EXIF/calibration camera params

meaning: How closely did achieved overlap match planned overlap? Insufficient overlap creates reconstruction gaps.
source_chain_text: min(overlap_fwd_execution_ratio, overlap_lat_execution_ratio) <- computed actual overlap (L2D_IMG) / user-input planned (SRC_UI_01)

meaning: How consistently did the drone maintain the planned altitude?
source_chain_text: altitude_execution_ratio <- actual_altitude_mean_m / planned_altitude_m <- BIN CTUN + BIN CMD

meaning: Were wind conditions within safe operating limits during the survey?
source_chain_text: wind_impact_ratio <- mean_wind_speed_ms / 12.0 <- Open-Meteo API (with BIN ATT fallback)

meaning: How much did altitude fluctuate during the survey cruise lines?
source_chain_text: altitude_variance_m <- std_dev(CTUN altitude) during cruise lines <- BIN CTUN

meaning: Did the drone complete all planned waypoints?
source_chain_text: mission_completion_ratio <- waypoints_completed / planned_waypoint_count <- BIN MISE + BIN CMD
gate_action: vibration_score and gimbal_score from FDR are now ACTIVE (BIN supplies them — no longer disabled).

meaning: Where did the calibration parameters originate? Physically measured calibration is ground truth.
source_chain_text: calibration_source <- Camera Calibration source file
gate_action: Shares logical name with L3I_IMG_007 but uses DIFFERENT thresholds (raises additional flags).

meaning: Does the calibration file match the actual camera hardware used in this survey?
source_chain_text: camera_make_match + camera_model_match <- EXIF.Make/Model vs calibration file
gate_action: Shares logical name with L3I_IMG_006 but uses DIFFERENT thresholds. See sheet 05.

meaning: How recently was this calibration performed or verified?
source_chain_text: calibration_age_months <- months_between(calibration_date, survey_date) <- L1F_CAL_007 + L1F_BIN_CAM_002
